title: lactuca mansuensis
intro: Lactuca mansuensis is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is a type of wild lettuce known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve sleep quality. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health issues, including insomnia, digestive problems, and menstrual disorders. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness their medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
